skill.label: Skill
skill.acceptance_evidence: Trigger, procedure, refusal states, tests, and remote read back

contract.label: Contract
contract.acceptance_evidence: Acceptance criteria, definition of done, receipt, and remote read back

architecture.label: Architecture
architecture.acceptance_evidence: Decision inputs, constraints, downstream effects, approval, and receipt

feature.label: Feature Specification
feature.acceptance_evidence: User story, acceptance criteria, definition of done, and tests

product_doc.label: Product Document
product_doc.acceptance_evidence: Product authority, scope, consumers, and receipt

memory_lesson.label: Memory Lesson
memory_lesson.acceptance_evidence: Source evidence, reusable rule, limits, and memory index pointer

memory_decision.label: Memory Decision
memory_decision.acceptance_evidence: Decision owner, alternatives, rationale, date, and memory index pointer

evidence.label: Evidence Pack
evidence.acceptance_evidence: Exact commands, outputs, hashes, screenshots, or authoritative read back

status.label: Status Record
status.acceptance_evidence: Current timestamp, evidence pointers, blockers, and next action

status_snapshot.label: Status Snapshot
status_snapshot.source_authority: The timestamped evidence backed status snapshot
status_snapshot.acceptance_evidence: Current timestamp, evidence pointers, blockers, next action, and deterministic routed path

live_status.label: Live Status
live_status.acceptance_evidence: Current timestamp, evidence pointers, blockers, next action, and matching latest snapshot

handoff.label: Handoff
handoff.acceptance_evidence: Sender, receiver, exact state, open risks, next action, and receipt

heartbeat_handoff.label: Heartbeat Handoff
heartbeat_handoff.source_authority: The latest receipt backed KP to Rory heartbeat handoff
heartbeat_handoff.acceptance_evidence: Precise work name, receipt or commit, stopping point, Rory action, and Rory done proof

template.label: Template
template.acceptance_evidence: Filled example, required fields, validation, and consumer read back

schema.label: Schema
schema.acceptance_evidence: Positive and negative fixtures plus repository tests

script.label: Script
script.acceptance_evidence: Direct execution, error cases, deterministic output, and tests

test.label: Test
test.acceptance_evidence: Passing positive, negative, and boundary cases

backlog.label: Backlog Item
backlog.acceptance_evidence: Precise task ID, owner, objective, outcome, next action, and definition of done

receipt.label: TruthCal Receipt
receipt.acceptance_evidence: Use the bridge receipt command and preserve its generated name

question.label: Question
question.acceptance_evidence: Use the question protocol and its next sequence ID
